meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't scale projects (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't scale projects. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Scale Your Freelance SaaS Builds
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale. Use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship professional-grade SaaS faster. Perfect for freelance AI builders.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template solves scaling bottlenecks by abstracting boilerplate and standardizing architecture. By integrating this template with Claude Code, you automate repetitive scaffolding, enforce modular patterns, and ensure consistent, high-performance output across every client project, allowing you to focus on logic rather than tedious structural setup.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a blank terminal, the weight of a new project looming. You know the architecture, but the sheer volume of boilerplate code required to get a production-ready SaaS off the ground is a soul-crushing barrier to speed. Every hour spent configuring auth, database schemas, and API routes is an hour lost on the features that actually pay the bills.

But what if the foundation was already laid? The Antigravity project template is the industry-standard accelerator for builders who demand velocity without compromising quality. By combining this modular framework with the autonomous precision of Claude Code, you transform from a manual coder into a high-leverage architect, shipping enterprise-grade solutions in a fraction of the time.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the foundational structure to ensure all future features are plug-and-play.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new SaaS project using the Antigravity standard template, including pre-configured auth-middleware and modular API routing.

steps.title: Configure Schema Serialization
steps.description: Define data structures once to prevent drift across your database and frontend models.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Define a robust schema for a user-managed SaaS dashboard using the Antigravity data-modeling standard.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate schema for user-dashboard with antigravity standards"

steps.title: Automate Feature Scaffolding
steps.description: Use Claude Code to inject specific business logic into the existing Antigravity modules.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a new feature module for subscription management that adheres to the Antigravity dependency injection pattern.

steps.title: Enforce Type Safety
steps.description: Automate the generation of type definitions to catch bugs before they reach the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scan the current project and generate strict TypeScript interfaces for all API response types.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate strict types for all routes"

steps.title: Performance Optimization Audit
steps.description: Run a final scan to ensure the project meets production-level efficiency standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the codebase for potential performance bottlenecks and suggest optimizations based on the Antigravity best practices.

pro_tips: Always use the --dry-run flag in Claude Code to verify architectural changes before modifying your file system.
Map your custom utility functions into the Antigravity /lib directory to ensure they are accessible across all modules without circular dependencies.
Use Claude Code's context-aware chat to document your custom Antigravity components automatically during the build process.
Keep your schema definitions in a dedicated /schema folder to allow for effortless database migrations when scaling client projects.
Leverage the Antigravity 'hot-reload' config to test API changes instantly without restarting the entire dev server.
resources: Best Practices for SaaS Architecture: https://saas-patterns.dev
content.next_steps: Once your template is initialized, start by building your most common feature module—like Auth or Billing—to create a reusable library for your future client work.
content.conversion_block: Stop building from scratch and start shipping at scale. Our community is packed with templates, custom scripts, and expert advice to help you dominate your freelance workflow. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
